suricata.t1046_icmp_ping.rules: alert icmp any any -> any any (msg:"T1046 ICMP Ping Detected"; itype:8; sid:1000002; rev:1;)
suricata.t1046_nmap_syn_scan.rules: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"T1046 Nmap SYN Scan Detected"; flags:S; flow:stateless; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 10; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:1000001; rev:1;)
suricata.t1071.001_http_user_agent_python_request: alert http any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"T1071.001 Suspicious HTTP User-Agent Python Requests"; http.user_agent; content:"python-requests"; nocase; sid:1000004; rev:1;)
